history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: An anime-style profile image is centered on a dark red background with large red greeting text and smaller white lines of text beneath it.

Main Subject:
Centered near the top-middle is a circular avatar containing an illustrated person with short, light brown and blonde hair, pale skin, and a neutral expression, rendered in anime style. The avatar is outlined with a red ring and has partially visible text around the top edge of the circle.

Setting:
The image appears to be a stylized graphic or promotional screen with no real-world setting shown. The background is a dark maroon/red collage-like illustration with faint shapes and line art, overlaid with semi-transparent textures. Lighting is flat and graphic, with red tones dominating.

Visual Details:
Across the center, the text “SELAMAT JALAN” appears in large uppercase letters in bright pinkish-red. Below it, “Sampai Jumpa Kembali” is shown in larger white text. Further down, there is smaller white text reading “Kayz x Hutao || Assisten [1]”. Near the lower center, a rounded rectangular button-like element contains red text “495 Left” on a darker red/pink background. The overall composition is symmetrical around the center, with the avatar above the main greeting text and the button below the smaller lines.

Visible Text:
SELAMAT JALAN
Sampai Jumpa Kembali
Kayz x Hutao || Assisten [1]
495 Left

Practical Summary:
The image shows a centered greeting message over a dark red anime-themed background. It includes a circular illustrated avatar at the top and a button-like element indicating “495 Left” below the text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
